memory.summary: Mina and Jae are inviting me to Echo, but I have a midterm tomorrow at 9am with only partial review done. My energy is low due to sleep debt, so going out might be risky.
Mina declined the invitation to Echo, likely due to my midterm. This reduces pressure, allowing me to focus on completing my partial review tonight.
Midterm prep progress improved to 0.78, but the missed club window adds social regret. With high energy and low stress, I should prioritize finishing review before sleep.
After a full 8-hour sleep, my energy is fully restored at 10.0 with zero debt. I can now confidently complete my midterm review tonight without fatigue concerns.
My midterm review is now complete, confirming my plan to rest. With full energy restored and no remaining tasks, I can sleep immediately.
Midterm begins now, but review is done. With full energy and zero stress, I can proceed calmly.
The midterm study is complete, confirming my plan to rest. With full energy and zero stress, I can proceed calmly.
Joining the social club group was unexpected and welcomed. I now have a new activity to consider after my midterm.
